pwa.installBody: Add ProfitSync to your home screen for quick, full-screen access.
pwa.iosBody: Tap the Share icon, then choose “Add to Home Screen”.
pwa.updateBody: A new version of ProfitSync is ready. Update now to get the latest features and fixes.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: The app couldn’t load — this can happen right after an update. Reload to get the latest version.

budgetsPage.title: Budgets
budgetsPage.subtitle: Track spending against your budgets and how they change over time.
budgetsPage.emptyHint: Set a budget to track spending and see its history and trends.
budgetsPage.templateNoChart: This is the default for new clients — no spend to chart.
budgetsPage.creepWarning: Raised {{count}} times (+{{pct}}%) — watch for budget creep.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.requestSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset code.
forgotPassword.resetSubtitle: Enter the code sent to {{email}} and choose a new password.
forgotPassword.codeRequired: Enter the code from your email.
forgotPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
forgotPassword.codeSent: We've sent a reset code to your email.
forgotPassword.requestFailed: Couldn't send a reset code. Check the email and try again.
forgotPassword.resetFailed: Couldn't reset your password. Check the code and try again.
forgotPassword.needsMfa: Two-factor authentication is required. Please finish signing in from the login page.

language.title: Language
language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the language used across the app.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Income, expenses and trends across your workspace

categories.title: Categories
categories.name: Name
categories.deleteBody: "{{name}}" will be removed from your category list. Existing transactions keep their label.
categories.renameHint: Renaming also updates the label on matching transactions.

attachments.deleteBody: "{{name}}" will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
attachments.noPreview: No preview available for this file type

multiSelect.confirmBody: The selected items will be moved to Trash. You can restore them later.
multiSelect.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the selected items

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noDataYet: No data yet. Add clients and transactions to see chart.
dashboard.companyUpsellBody: Manage clients, send quotations, and invite your team — try a Company workspace, free.
dashboard.layoutSaveFailed: Couldn't save the layout — try again
dashboard.editHint: Drag the handle to reorder · × hides a card
dashboard.hiddenCards: Hidden cards — tap to add back:
dashboard.discardBody: Your dashboard will go back to how it was before you started editing.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.currencyDescription: Currency is now set per organization. Open an organization to change its currency — only owners and admins can.
profile.logoutDescription: Sign out of your ProfitSync account
profile.photoHint: Square image works best. PNG, JPG or WebP.
profile.photoInvalid: Couldn't read that image — try a different file

onboarding.q1Title: Is this for personal or company use?
onboarding.q1Subtitle: Pick the experience that fits. You can change this later.
onboarding.companyNameOptional: Optional — you can rename it later
onboarding.freeIncluded: Everything you need to get started
onboarding.setupMoneySubtitle: Add your starting balances and budgets — all optional, you can change them anytime.
onboarding.freeBankNote: 1 bank account on Free — upgrade later for unlimited.
onboarding.detailsSubtitle: A couple of quick settings — you can change them later.
onboarding.cashQuestion: How much cash do you have on hand?
onboarding.budgetQuestionBusiness: Set a budget for your company?
onboarding.budgetHint: Optional — you can change this anytime.
onboarding.addDefaultBudget: Also set a default for new clients
onboarding.cashQuestionBusiness: How much cash does the business have on hand?
onboarding.newOrgSubtitle: Name it and pick a currency — you can change these later.

transactions.attachmentWillBeDeletedPermanently: This attachment will be permanently deleted.
transactions.max2MBPerFileUploadedWithTransaction: Max 2MB per file. Files will be uploaded with the transaction.
transactions.noAccountFound: No account found. Add a bank or cash account first.
transactions.partialSplitSaved: Saved {{saved}} of {{total}} — the rest couldn't be added
transactions.transactionWillBeDeletedPermanently: This transaction will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
transactions.deleteSplitWarning: This is a split — all {{count}} parts will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
transactions.enterAmountForEachAccount: Enter an amount for each selected account
transactions.tapMoreToSplit: Tap more accounts to split the amount
transactions.splitHint: Each account is saved as its own transaction.

wealth.title: Wealth
wealth.subtitle: Manual tracking only — ProfitSync never connects to your bank.
wealth.healthWarn: Heads up — an account is negative
wealth.adjustHint: ProfitSync records a Balance Adjustment transaction for the difference.
wealth.archivedHint: Archived accounts stay linked to old transaction history.
wealth.name: Name
wealth.cashAlwaysHere: Your Cash in Hand is always here. Add bank accounts to track them separately.
wealth.maxBanksReached: You can add up to {{max}} bank accounts.
wealth.cashPermanent: Cash in Hand can't be removed.
wealth.noTransactionsForAccount: No transactions in this account yet
wealth.couldNotAdd: Could not add account. Please try again.
wealth.couldNotUpdate: Could not update account. Please try again.
wealth.closeAccountDesc: The account keeps its history but is hidden from your active accounts. You can reopen it later from the archived section.
wealth.dragHint: Tip: drag the handle to reorder — drop on the middle of another account to transfer.
wealth.upgradeBanksBody: Free plans include {{limit}} bank account. Upgrade to Premium for up to 20 — closed accounts kept too.
wealth.bankLimitBody: You have reached the maximum of {{limit}} bank accounts (including closed ones). Permanently delete a closed account to add another.

quotations.convertToClientDescription: This will create a new client from {{name}} and mark this quotation as accepted. You'll be redirected to the new client's page.
quotations.moveToTrashDescription: This quotation will be moved to the trash. You can restore it later from the Trash page.
quotations.deleteAttachmentDescription: This attachment will be permanently deleted.

organizations.pageDescription: You must have at least one organization. Each organization has its own data.
organizations.noOrganizationsYet: You don't have any organizations yet. Create one to get started.
organizations.name: Name
organizations.currencyUsedForFormatting: Used to format every amount displayed inside this organization.
organizations.deleteOrganizationWarning: This will permanently delete {{name}} and all of its clients, transactions, and quotations. This cannot be undone.
organizations.logoHint: Shown in the sidebar and organization lists. Square image works best.
organizations.logoInvalid: Couldn't read that image — try a different file

members.inviteTeammatesAndManageRoles: Invite teammates and manage their roles.
members.roleDescription: Editors can create and edit; viewers see read-only data; admins can manage members.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.choosePlan: Choose the plan that fits your team.
subscription.noInvoices: No invoices yet. They'll appear here after your first payment.
subscription.paymentConfirmed: Payment confirmed — your plan is now active. 🎉
subscription.paymentProcessingDesc: Your plan will activate shortly. Refresh in a moment.
subscription.checkoutClosedDesc: Your subscription is still pending. You can retry anytime.
subscription.cancelConfirm: Cancel your subscription? There are no refunds — you’ll keep {{name}} access until {{date}}, then it switches to Free. You won’t be charged again.
subscription.noInvoiceDoc: No invoice document is available yet.
subscription.planCancelledLine: Cancelled — active until your access ends.
subscription.switchToYearlyDesc: Pay yearly and save {{pct}}%. You’ll be charged the yearly price now and switch immediately.
subscription.switchConfirm: Switch to yearly billing now? You’ll be charged the yearly price today and your plan switches to yearly immediately.
subscription.cancelNote: No refunds. Your plan stays active until the renewal date, then automatically switches to Free.
subscription.resubscribeNote: Your plan ends on {{date}}. Resubscribe anytime to keep your features.
subscription.cancelDialogDesc: There are no refunds — you’ll keep {{name}} access until {{date}}, then it switches to Free. You won’t be charged again.
subscription.switchDialogDesc: You’ll be charged the yearly price today (saving {{pct}}%) and switch to yearly immediately.
subscription.resumeSuccess: Subscription resumed — it will keep renewing as usual.
subscription.cancellingNotice: Your plan is set to cancel on {{date}}. You’ll keep full access until then.
subscription.cancelScheduledToast: Your subscription will cancel on {{date}} — you keep full access until then.

trash.title: Trash
trash.deleteForeverDesc: {{name}} will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered. All associated data will be lost.

recurring.title: Recurring payments
recurring.subtitle: Money that repeats on a schedule — created for you automatically.
recurring.name: Name
recurring.amountRequired: Enter an amount greater than zero
recurring.accountHint: The account this payment moves money in or out of.
recurring.endsOnHint: Optional — leave empty to repeat forever.
recurring.backdatedHint: Starting in the past creates the missed payments right away.
recurring.deleteBody: "{{name}}" will stop repeating. Payments already created are kept.
recurring.emptyHint: Set up rent, salaries or subscriptions once — ProfitSync records them automatically when they're due.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Your money activity, day by day.

flow.title: Money flow
flow.subtitle: See where your money comes from and where it goes, as a connected map.
flow.emptyHint: Add some transactions, or widen the date range and filters, to see your money flow.
flow.timelineSubtitle: Watch your running balance evolve over time — before, change and after, period by period.

spaces.title: Spaces
spaces.subtitle: Set money aside for the things you are saving up for.
spaces.emptyHint: A Space is a savings pot — move money in from any account and watch it grow toward a goal.
spaces.namePlaceholder: e.g. Holiday, New laptop, Emergency fund
spaces.goalHint: Add a goal and a date and we will suggest how much to save each month.
spaces.noSpendable: Add a bank or cash account first to move money into a Space.
spaces.withdrawTooMuch: You can not withdraw more than the Space holds.
spaces.deleteBody: “{{name}}” will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
spaces.upgradeBody: Your plan includes {{limit}} Space. Upgrade to Premium for up to 7.
spaces.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.
spaces.deleteFailed: Could not delete. Please try again.
spaces.autoSaveOffHint: Save automatically from an account on a schedule.
spaces.noActivity: No money has moved in or out yet.
spaces.endsOptional: Optional — leave blank to keep going.
spaces.autoSaveExplain: Move money into this Space automatically on a schedule — like a standing order to yourself. It transfers from the account you choose; pause or change it anytime.
spaces.deleteWithMoney: This Space still holds {{amount}}. Choose where to move it — then the Space will be closed.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty_hint: New notifications will show up here.

settings.title: Notifications
settings.description: Choose what you get notified about and where.
settings.user_description: Your personal notification preferences across all workspaces.
settings.org_description: Organization-wide notification policy for this workspace.
settings.client_description: Notification settings just for this client.
settings.mute_all_hint: Turn off every notification at this level.

push.blocked: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings
push.unsupported: Push notifications aren't supported on this device
push.description: Get notified even when ProfitSync isn't open.

payment_failed.title: Payment failed
payment_failed.body: We couldn't process your latest payment. Update your billing to keep Premium.
